title: crispy glassy malaysian pasta pilaf
description: a delicate and savory malaysian dish featuring linguine pasta, grilled shrimp, and a glassy-jelly sauce.
instructions: heat 1 tbsp of vegetable oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
add the sliced shallots and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
add the sliced chili peppers and cook for 1 minute, until slightly softened.
add the shrimp and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
remove the shrimp from the pan and set aside.
add the remaining 1 tbsp of vegetable oil to the pan.
add the sambal oelek, fish sauce, dark soy sauce, and palm sugar to the pan.
stir to combine and cook for 1 minute.
add the coconut milk to the pan and stir to combine.
bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes, until slightly thickened.
add the shrimp back to the pan and cook until heated through.
stir in the chopped cilantro and cook for 1 minute.
serve the shrimp and sauce over the cooked linguine pasta.
